title: DNA Extraction Protocol from Sterivex Filters
author: Meghan M. Shea
materials: Assemble materials and reagents needed: 1000 µL pipette tips (that fit in the inlet of the Sterivex) 200 µL pipette tips Proteinase K (from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit) ATL Buffer (from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit)

Assemble other reagents & materials needed: Sterile 3 mL syringes (one per sample) AL Buffer (from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit) Buffer AW1 (from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit) Buffer AW2 (from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit)
Immediately transfer tubes to room temperature
For each sample and extraction blank follow the remaining Qiagen DNeasy Tissue and Blood Kit steps:

steps.title: Clean bench area with bleach, ethanol, and RNase away
steps.instruction: Clean bench area with bleach, ethanol, and RNase away

steps.title: Turn on incubator and set to 56°C
steps.instruction: Turn on incubator and set to 56°C

steps.title: Wipe down 1000 µL and 200...
steps.instruction: Wipe down 1000 µL and 200 µL pipettes with RNase Away and UV for 15 minutes on each side

steps.title: Remove sterivex filters from -15°C freezer...
steps.instruction: Remove sterivex filters from -15°C freezer The roller shaker used (see MATERIALS) only fits 15 Sterivex filters, which creates a 16 sample extraction batch with an additional extraction blank added on Day 2. 16 samples could be well-balanced in the centrifuge used, leading to easier subsequent processing. If processing a different number of filters, consider the subsequent processing steps (especially centrifuging) when deciding how many to extract at once.

steps.title: Remove Sterivex from Whirl-Pak bag and...
steps.instruction: Remove Sterivex from Whirl-Pak bag and remove cap from inlet end of Sterivex filter

steps.title: Slowly pipette 720 µL of ATL...
steps.instruction: Slowly pipette 720 µL of ATL buffer directly on top of the filter through the inlet, again avoiding backsplash

steps.title: Secure Sterivex with same luer cap
steps.instruction: Secure Sterivex with same luer cap

steps.title: Place all filters onto roller shaker...
steps.instruction: Place all filters onto roller shaker in incubator Sterivex arranged on roller shaker in incubator (Photo Credit: Meghan M. Shea)

steps.title: Incubate at 56°C for ~24 hours...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 56°C for ~24 hours (minimum of 12 hours; try to incubate for the same amount of time for all filters for a particular project) while rotating at approximately 6 rpm

steps.title: Slowly pipette 80 µL of Proteinase...
steps.instruction: Slowly pipette 80 µL of Proteinase K directly on top of the filter through the inlet, avoiding backsplash by expelling slowly

steps.title: Soak all tube racks in a...
steps.instruction: Soak all tube racks in a 10% bleach solution, followed by 3 rinses with DI water. Let dry and UV for 15 minutes

steps.title: UV Qubit and LoBind tubes for...
steps.instruction: UV Qubit and LoBind tubes for 15 minutes (in pre-sterilized tube racks) and label with sample numbers: Qubit: (# of samples+ extraction blank) + 2 for standards 1.5/2 mL LoBind: (# of samples + extraction blank) * 3 5 mL LoBind: # of samples + extraction blank Enough tubes (any type, does not need to be LoBind) to hold AE Buffer that fit in heat block (see Step 15), and to hold Qubit working solution (see Step 23.1)

steps.title: Open and label additional tubes needed...
steps.instruction: Open and label additional tubes needed from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit: Packaged spin columns: # of samples + extraction blank Additional collection tubes: (# of samples + extraction blank) * 2

steps.title: Place 50 mL tube of molecular-grade...
steps.instruction: Place 50 mL tube of molecular-grade ethanol in freezer or on ice to chill for later use

steps.title: Heat aliquot (volume calculation below) of...
steps.instruction: Heat aliquot (volume calculation below) of AE buffer (from Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit) on heating block at 70°C Volume: (# of samples including blank * 100 µl) * 1.1

steps.title: Make cryo-labels for storage tubes (2 of 3 1
steps.instruction: Make cryo-labels for storage tubes (2 of 3 1.5/2 mL LoBind tubes already sterilized)

steps.title: Wipe down 1000 µl pipette, 200...
steps.instruction: Wipe down 1000 µl pipette, 200 µl pipette, 100 µl pipette, 10 µl pipette with RNase Away and UV for 15 minutes on each side

steps.title: Remove Sterivex filters from incubator
steps.instruction: Remove Sterivex filters from incubator

steps.title: Remove liquid from each filter:
steps.instruction: Remove liquid from each filter:

steps.title: Remove caps from filter
steps.instruction: Remove caps from filter

steps.title: Using a sterile 3 mL syringe...
steps.instruction: Using a sterile 3 mL syringe attached to the inlet end of the Sterivex, remove all liquid from filter, record the volume, and transfer into a 5 mL LoBind tube

steps.title: Pipet the mixture (650 µl at...
steps.instruction: Pipet the mixture (650 µl at a time) into a DNeasy Mini Spin column placed in a collection tube

steps.title: Spin in micro-centrifuge for 1 minute...
steps.instruction: Spin in micro-centrifuge for 1 minute at 6000 x g (8000 rpm)

steps.title: Discard flow throw, and dab the...
steps.instruction: Discard flow throw, and dab the rim of the spin column dry on a Kimwipe

steps.title: Repeat sub-steps of 22 until all...
steps.instruction: Repeat sub-steps of 22 until all sample is filtered through spin column

steps.title: Place the spin column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a new collection tube, add 500 µl Buffer AW1

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 minute at 6000 x g (8000 rpm)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 minute at 6000 x g (8000 rpm). Discard flow through and collection tube.

steps.title: Place in new collection tube and...
steps.instruction: Place in new collection tube and add 500 µl Buffer AW2

steps.title: Centrifuge for 3 min at 20,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 3 min at 20,000 x g (14000 rpm) to dry the membrane

steps.title: Discard flow through and dab rim...
steps.instruction: Discard flow through and dab rim of spin column on a clean Kimwipe

steps.title: Place the spin column back in...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column back in collection tube and centrifuge for 1 min at 20,000 x g (14000 rpm)

steps.title: Transfer spin column to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer spin column to new 1.5/2 mL LoBind tube with cap left open

steps.title: Place samples in 70°C heat block
steps.instruction: Place samples in 70°C heat block

steps.title: Add 100 µl Buffer AE (4...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl Buffer AE (4 samples at a time) directly over membrane

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at 6000 x g (8000 rpm)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at 6000 x g (8000 rpm)

steps.title: Re-elute DNA from DNA LoBind tube...
steps.instruction: Re-elute DNA from DNA LoBind tube (apply eluate back on spin column while tubes are in heat block)

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at 6000 x g (8000 rpm)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at 6000 x g (8000 rpm)

steps.title: Discard the spin column Sample tubes...
steps.instruction: Discard the spin column Sample tubes should now contain a final volume of 100 µl of DNA extract

steps.title: Aliquot 1 µl of each sample into labeled Qubit tubes
steps.instruction: Aliquot 1 µl of each sample into labeled Qubit tubes

steps.title: Transfer ~50 µl of remaining DNA...
steps.instruction: Transfer ~50 µl of remaining DNA extract to 2 pre-marked DNA LoBind tubes with lids intact: 1 archive tube to store at -80°C 1 working tube to store at -15°C Aliquot to archive tube first, so that archive volumes are consistently 50 µl. Working tube volumes may be slightly less than 50 µl due to Qubit aliquot, etc.

steps.title: Use Qubit to measure DNA concentrations in all samples:
steps.instruction: Use Qubit to measure DNA concentrations in all samples:

steps.title: Make Qubit working solution
steps.instruction: Make Qubit working solution: Reagent: ((# of samples + extraction blank + 2) * 1 )*1.1 Buffer: ((# of samples + extraction blank + 2) * 199)*1.1

steps.title: Vortex Qubit working solution
steps.instruction: Vortex Qubit working solution

steps.title: Add 199 µl of working solution...
steps.instruction: Add 199 µl of working solution to Qubit tubes containing sample DNA

steps.title: Add 190 µl of working solution...
steps.instruction: Add 190 µl of working solution to Qubit tubes for 2 standards

steps.title: Add 10 µl of respective standards...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µl of respective standards to Qubit tubes for 2 standards

steps.title: Mix all tubes gently by vortexing,...
steps.instruction: Mix all tubes gently by vortexing, being sure not to introduce bubbles

steps.title: Allow tubes to incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Allow tubes to incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes

steps.title: Read samples with Qubit fluorometer and record DNA concentrations
steps.instruction: Read samples with Qubit fluorometer and record DNA concentrations

steps.title: Clean bench area (including vortex), centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Clean bench area (including vortex), centrifuge area, and centrifuge with bleach, ethanol, and RNase away.

steps.title: Create an extraction blank by adding...
steps.instruction: Create an extraction blank by adding 1000 uL nuclease free water subbed in for extracted liquid to a 5 mL LoBind tube

steps.title: For each sample and extraction blank,...
steps.instruction: For each sample and extraction blank, add AL buffer and 0°C ethanol to the extracted liquid in a 1:1:1 ratio and vortex vigorously for 10 seconds

steps.title: For each sample and extraction blank,...
steps.instruction: For each sample and extraction blank, filter the mixture through a spin column:
